All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AttackResult
 
Board
Represents the 10x10 game board.
BoardCellRenderer
Utility class responsible for rendering board cells with images and effects.
Game
Main class that represents the complete state of a Battleship game.
GameController
 
GameOverController
 
HumanPlayer
 
IBoard
 
IPlayer
 
IShip
 
MachinePlayer
 
MachineThread
Utility class that executes the machine's turn in a separate thread to prevent freezing the JavaFX UI.
Main
 
MenuController
 
Orientation
 
Player
Base class for players (human and machine).
SaveManager
Manages saving and loading of games using serialization and text files.
Ship
Represents a single ship in the game.
TimeThread
